situation: Delete buttons in HistoryTab and SidePanelApp SVG overlay lack proper accessibility attributes. HistoryTab uses bare 'x' text with no aria-label; SVG <g> element acting as delete button has no role, tabIndex, aria-label, or keyboard handler. Screen readers cannot identify these controls.
action: Added aria-label with contextual info to HistoryTab delete button, wrapped visual 'x' in aria-hidden span. Added role=button, tabIndex=0, aria-label, onKeyDown Enter/Space handler to SVG <g> delete element, marked × text as aria-hidden. Applied fix directly in diverged worktree opt-sidepanel-id-delete-fix-1783378817 (case-104 escape hatch due to cp-guard on opt-sidepanel-1782907225).
outcome_evidence: Commit 2352efe on auto/opt-sidepanel-id-delete-fix-1783378817 pushed to origin. Both files modified: HistoryTab button gets aria-label + aria-hidden span; SidePanelApp SVG g gets role=button/tabIndex/aria-label/onKeyDown.
next_suggestion: Next pending fix: SZ-PP-L-002 (testVisionConnection has no timeout — button disabled forever on hang) or SZ-SP-L-007 (handleViewHistory does not reset editing state). 15 route-fixes remaining in audit-2026-07-07-047 cycle.

audit_findings.finding: Delete button uses bare 'x' text content with no aria-label — screen readers announce only 'x' with no context about what it deletes
audit_findings.remediation: Add aria-label with timestamp context, wrap visual x in aria-hidden span

audit_findings.finding: SVG <g> element acts as interactive delete button but lacks role=button, tabIndex, aria-label, and keyboard event handler — completely invisible to assistive technology
audit_findings.remediation: Add role=button, tabIndex=0, aria-label, onKeyDown for Enter/Space, mark decorative × text aria-hidden
